project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo) with 13 apps, 17 services, 37 packages
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 + Turbo 2.9.14. turbo.json defines lint/typecheck/test/build tasks. Only packages that define matching scripts in package.json get run.
test_framework: Vitest 2.x with vitest run in each package
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2. pnpm typecheck 3. pnpm build 4. pnpm test 5. pnpm lint 6. pnpm audit --audit-level=high 7. node scripts/test.cjs
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access, can install packages. Node 22, pnpm available. No Docker daemon needed for basic validation.
contribution_requirements: Do not weaken global strictness. Prefer small verifiable increments. Every phase must end with command output evidence.
key_patterns: Root eslint.config.mjs exists but only scopes packages/database/src. No package has a lint script. Apps use Next.js 14 (3 apps) and Fastify 5. packages/ranking uses old Fastify 4 as devDep. packages/notifications uses @parse/node-apn which pulls vulnerable node-forge. services/smtp-inbound uses nodemailer@6.9. packages/server/src/middleware/auth.ts has hardcoded fallback JWT secrets. apps/quantmeet/backend/routes/ws.ts has TODO for WebSocket auth. packages/server-core/src/app.ts already registers @fastify/helmet and @fastify/rate-limit. packages/security has CSPGenerator, rate limiter, and many security utilities.
directory_structure: apps/ - 13 Next.js/Fastify apps. packages/ - 37 shared packages. services/ - 17 microservices (6 have package.json). .github/workflows/ - CI, quality gates, security scan, deploy workflows.
